core_loop_signature: assign villagers to food wood and stone, place production buildings, train counter units, scout fogged regions, survive raids, then destroy the enemy landmark or hold neutral obelisks
differentiation_axes: worker economy with three resources instead of energy-only spawning
free movement top-down skirmish map instead of fixed lanes
building placement and production queues before combat commitment
fog scouting and neutral objective capture as timing pressure
landmark assault victory with optional obelisk control alternative
forbidden_template_reuse: fixed wall defense with tower slots

map_content_budget.play_area_model: top-down ancient camp battlefield with player base, enemy base, neutral center, side resources, choke paths, and one flanking route
map_content_budget.route_or_region_count: minimum seven regions: player camp, enemy camp, two side resource pockets, two neutral obelisks, central choke, and optional flank trail
map_content_budget.decorative_prop_count: at least twelve small props distributed across non-interactive dead space
map_content_budget.camera_or_scroll_model: landscape fixed full-map fit for early maps with optional soft pan on larger map three

special_rules: population cap from Town Hut tier
fog hides enemy tech until scouted
neutral obelisks create alternative hold victory
rams are strong against buildings but weak without guards
risk_reward_systems: delayed stone-tech assault risks enemy final wave
outer resource pockets improve income but expose villagers
obelisk capture diverts troops from landmark assault
failure_pressure_variants: enemy tech timer escalates unit quality

secondary_game_art_packs: tactical selection rings and rally markers
asset_variety_budget.minimum_distinct_sprite_families: at least six unit families, five building families, three resource families, and four effect families
asset_variety_budget.asset_reuse_note: asset selection must avoid reusing lane defense, wall defense, or fantasy side-view unit families as the primary visual identity
